title: Measurement, SI Units, Dimensional Analysis, and Uncertainty
description: Measure a room, select materials, convert specifications, and report tolerances for a community repair. Learners cumulatively produce a unit-safe materials estimate through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose appropriate SI base and derived units and write their symbols correctly.
Convert quantities with unit factors that equal one and cancel dimensions explicitly.
Square or cube conversion factors when converting area and volume.
